series_metadata.series_description: BMV Investigative reports, complaint forms, and evidence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Active cases are maintained at the District Office until closed. Closed cases are retained seven (7) years from the date closed and then destroyed ; Electronic: Investigative and applicable evidence are maintained electronically in a case management system (CMS). Closed cases are retained for seven (7) years from the date closed and then destroyed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
